exhibitions.title: Where the work meets the public
exhibitions.subtitle: A path through museums, foundations, institutional galleries and international residencies that have hosted the practice.
exhibitions.upcoming_1_description: Thirty new works on the relationship between matter, memory and the Tuscan landscape. In partnership with Fondazione Palazzo Strozzi.
exhibitions.upcoming_2_description: Exhibition dialogue with an emerging artist from the Milanese scene, curated by Fondazione Prada's Osservatorio.
exhibitions.upcoming_3_description: A selection of contemporary Italian artists for MAXXI's new cycle dedicated to the Mediterranean landscape.
exhibitions.upcoming_4_description: Studio opened to the public with works in progress developed during the residency at the American Academy. By appointment.
exhibitions.institutional_subheading: Awards, acquisitions and residencies that have shaped the public path of the work.
exhibitions.institutional_1_description: National finalist of the 18th Talent Prize, with jury mention for pictorial research.
exhibitions.institutional_2_name: MAXXI — National Museum of 21st Century Arts
exhibitions.institutional_2_description: Two works enter MAXXI's permanent collection in the Italian contemporary painting section.
exhibitions.institutional_3_name: American Academy in Rome — Visiting Artist
exhibitions.institutional_3_description: Annual residency as Visiting Artist with a studio at Villa Aurelia and access to the AAR collection.
exhibitions.no_upcoming_body: New dates are coming. Subscribe to the newsletter to receive announcements first.

collect.title: Collect
collect.hero_subtitle: Your journey to art that moves you
collect.step1_description: Browse the works and find the one that speaks to you. Every piece tells a unique story.
collect.step2_description: Discover the story behind each work. Why it was born, what it wanted to say, what emotion it holds.
collect.step3_description: Every work is certified on Algorand blockchain. Guaranteed authenticity, traceable provenance.
collect.step4_description: Secure purchase on the FlorenceEGI platform. Digital certificate of authenticity included.
collect.blockchain_badge: Every work is certified on Algorand blockchain by FlorenceEGI
collect.why_authenticity_desc: Immutable blockchain certification on every work. No doubt, no forgery.
collect.why_provenance_desc: Complete chain of ownership from creation to today. Total transparency.
collect.why_direct_desc: Zero intermediaries. Your purchase directly supports the artist and their vision.
collect.trust_blockchain_desc: Every work registered on Algorand with immutable authenticity proof
collect.trust_certificate_desc: Digital document signed by the artist included with every purchase
collect.trust_direct_desc: Zero intermediaries: your purchase supports the creator
collect.trust_return_desc: Doesn't move you? Full refund, no questions
collect.testimonial_1_quote: I discovered FlorenceEGI by chance. Now I don't buy art anywhere else. Blockchain transparency is revolutionary.
collect.testimonial_2_quote: The ability to trace provenance made me fall in love. Every work I collect has a verifiable story.
collect.testimonial_3_quote: Buying direct from the artist means truly supporting who creates. And certification makes every purchase a serious investment.
collect.commission_subtitle: Commission a unique work, made for you, certified on blockchain

story_behind.title: The story behind every line
story_behind.subtitle: Before the work, there's the gesture. Before the gesture, the question. This is the path that shaped it.
story_behind.manifesto: I create because I see something that doesn't yet exist, and I cannot leave it invisible. Every work is a promise kept to an idea.
story_behind.origin_body: I grew up believing that drawing was a way of listening. Before words, I had hands; before hands, I had vision. My training isn't a list of schools — it's the time I spent watching light change a white wall.
story_behind.craft_body: Craft is the discipline of failing well. Every day in the studio is a negotiation between intuition and matter. No work comes out clean on the first attempt — and this is the honest part of the work.
story_behind.voice_body: My voice is not a stylistic signature: it's the sum of decisions I made when no one was watching. It's the reason certain works enter a room and change it.
story_behind.horizon_body: I don't work to conclude. I work to open the next question. Every work is a threshold, not an answer.
story_behind.quote: Art is not what you see, but what you make others see.
story_behind.cta_text: Now that you know the path, it's time to walk it alongside the work.

process.title: Inside the studio
process.subtitle: A work is not born in a single moment. It's born in five, repeated until they become language.
process.stage_spark_body: It all starts from a mental image, a phrase, a glimpse of light. I write it down before I understand, not to lose the temperature of the moment.
process.stage_sketch_body: I pick up paper. I'm not looking for the right form: I'm looking for direction. Dozens of fast variants, with no attachment to any of them.
process.stage_build_body: Here the physical work begins. Materials, layers, tests, errors. The work starts to exist — and to demand.
process.stage_refine_body: I subtract more than I add. Every detail is questioned until it stands on its own.
process.stage_release_body: The work stops being mine. It crosses the studio threshold and begins its life in the world.
process.tool_studio_detail: Natural north light, high ceiling, large central table. Silence chosen, not found.
process.tool_materials_detail: Papers of varying weight, hand-ground pigments, supports I prepare myself.
process.tool_software_detail: Only when the hand isn't enough. Never as a substitute for the hand.
process.tool_archive_detail: Every attempt is kept. Today's discard is tomorrow's direction.
process.ritual_body: I enter the studio at six. A short walk, coffee, silence, then the first line before the mind has time to judge.
process.cta_text: Want to follow the process day by day? The studio journal is public.

journal.title: Notes from the studio
journal.subtitle: Work in progress, sketches, intermediate images. The process as it happens — not when it's done.
journal.empty_body: Pick another tag or go back to "All" to see every studio note.
journal.newsletter_body: One email every two weeks. Zero noise, only work.
journal.post_1_excerpt: The first hours in front of a blank sheet are when the series decides who it will be. Today it decided to be quiet.
journal.post_2_excerpt: It's not perfectionism. It's subtraction. Every discarded sketch is a closed direction in favor of the right one.
journal.post_3_title: Installation in Milan: behind the scenes
journal.post_3_excerpt: Three weeks of preparation, two days of installation, one hour of opening. What no one sees.
journal.post_4_excerpt: It's a method. Patience in creative work isn't waiting for something to arrive — it's coming back every day even when it doesn't.
journal.post_5_title: The work table, over five years
journal.post_5_excerpt: Photos of the same table every March 1st. It's the most honest thing I can show of my work.
journal.post_6_title: When a work decides not to finish
journal.post_6_excerpt: I worked on the same piece for seven months. Yesterday I put it away. It's not surrender — it's listening.

live.title: Upcoming moments
live.subtitle: Live work is the opposite of the studio. Here the question is public, the answer is shared.
live.no_upcoming_body: The studio is preparing the next public moment. Subscribe to notifications so you don't miss it.
live.notify_body: A notification only when a new event is published. No spam, no promotions.
live.upcoming_1_description: Public opening of the solo exhibition. Curator talk at 7:30 PM, reception at 8:00 PM.
live.upcoming_2_description: Two hours of live work. Fixed camera on the table, no commentary. Open chat for questions.
live.upcoming_3_description: Public dialogue on the relationship between time and gesture, with archive projections.
live.upcoming_4_description: Two-hour large-scale live drawing. Stage lighting, dedicated sound score.
